name: Question Answer API
summary: API endpoint for submitting user answers to pending agent questions. Resolves the pending question in the agent service and resumes agent processing.
goals: Accept user answers to pending agent questions
Resume agent processing after answer submission

acceptanceCriteria.given: an agent has a pending question
acceptanceCriteria.when: POST /api/agents/:id/tool-result is called with an answer
acceptanceCriteria.then: the answer is forwarded to the agent and processing resumes

specDetail.description: API endpoint that accepts user answers for pending agent questions. The agent-service.submitAnswer method resolves the pending promise that the Claude adapter is waiting on, allowing the agent to continue processing with the user answer.
parameters: POST /api/agents/:id/tool-result: answer field is required, can be string or array of strings
Returns 404 if agent not found or no pending question

constraints: Answer field is required, undefined returns 400
Agent must exist, non-existent agent ID returns 404
Answer can be a single string or array of strings for multi-select

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure

name: Slash Commands API
summary: API endpoints for discovering available slash commands and executing them within an agent session. Supports built-in commands and project-specific skills discovery.
goals: List available slash commands including built-in and project skills
Execute slash commands and return results

acceptanceCriteria.then: built-in commands and project-specific skills are returned

acceptanceCriteria.given: an active agent and a valid command
acceptanceCriteria.then: the command is executed and the result is returned

parameters: GET /api/slash-commands: cwd query param for project context, returns commands array
POST /api/agents/:id/command: command field is required, optional args string
Built-in commands: clear, compact, model, help
Skill discovery: scans Claude plugin cache and project .claude/skills directory
Returns success boolean and message/error in result

constraints: Command field is required, empty returns 400
Agent must exist, non-existent agent returns 404
Skill discovery may fail if plugin cache is unavailable
Model command requires a valid model name as argument

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure

name: Todo Tracking UI
summary: Visual display of task progress within agent chat sessions. Shows a bar of todo items with status indicators that update in real-time as the agent works.
goals: Display real-time task progress with status indicators
Show completed todo snapshots in message history

acceptanceCriteria.given: an agent creates todo items via TodoWrite
acceptanceCriteria.then: the todo bar shows each item with pending/in_progress/completed status

specDetail.description: TodoBar component that displays a horizontal bar of todo items at the bottom of the chat area during agent processing. Each item shows content text and a status indicator. When all items are completed, a snapshot is taken and displayed as a message in the chat history.
parameters: TodoBar shows items with colored status dots: pending gray, in-progress blue, completed green
Items update in real-time as agent executes TodoWrite tool
Completed snapshots preserved in message history as todoSnapshot field
TodoCard in tool-cards renders individual todo items within tool results

constraints: TodoBar only visible during streaming or when todos exist
Maximum display length per item — long content may be truncated
Completed todo snapshot fires 1.5 seconds after all items complete
Todos are per-agent, not shared across sessions

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure

name: Todo Tracking API
summary: API endpoint for retrieving todo items associated with an agent session. Supports loading persisted todos when restoring a previous session.
goals: Return todo items for a specific agent session

acceptanceCriteria.given: an agent session with todo items
acceptanceCriteria.then: the todo items for that session are returned

specDetail.description: Simple GET endpoint that returns todo items for an agent session from the database. Used when restoring a previous session to display the last known todo state.
parameters: GET /api/agents/:id/todos returns array of todo items
Each item has id, content, status, and optional activeForm
Todo data originates from TodoWrite tool events during agent processing

constraints: Returns empty array if agent has no todos
Todos are read-only via this endpoint, updates happen through TodoWrite tool events

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure
